# Phase 1: Account, Auth & Reference Data - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-05-19
**Status:** Ready for planning

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Establish the auth-and-lookup substrate so later phases can rely on canonical reference data (countries, states, cities, places, reason codes, service kinds, feature flags) and account/permissions context.

**Requirements covered:** AUTH-03, AUTH-04, AUTH-05, AUTH-06, AUTH-07, AUTH-08, AUTH-09, AUTH-10, AUTH-11, AUTH-12, AUTH-13, ADDR-01, ADDR-02, ADDR-03, ADDR-04, ADDR-05, ADDR-06, ADDR-07, ADDR-08, INTG-19, ORDL-08, ORDL-09, ORDL-10, ORDL-11, ORDL-12

**Depends on:** Nothing (foundation phase; AUTH-01/02 already shipped supply the actor-token diagnostic).

</domain>
